scope: XSK/page-pool stale completion quarantine and packet memory return source map for CapSched QueueLease revoke

authority_root.required: monitor-owned QueueLease epoch plus DMA/IOMMU/MemoryView receipt plus stale-completion quarantine receipt

source_anchors.limitation: ice cleanup and completion calls are Linux lifetime/accounting mechanisms, not stale-epoch quarantine proof.
AF_XDP queue mechanics expose completion and free-list behavior but do not encode CapSched Domain/epoch quarantine.
page_pool recycle/free decisions are not Domain/epoch memory-return authority.

required_invariants: No XSK CQ submit after revoke unless fresh epoch or explicit quarantine delivery policy exists
No xsk_buff_free free-list return after revoke without quarantine settlement
No page_pool normal recycle after revoke without fresh page-pool epoch
No packet memory return before DMA/IOMMU/MemoryView receipt
No PageOwner transfer before stale XSK/page-pool completion quarantine
No packet memory return without generation reset or retag
No double return through XSK and page-pool/PageOwner paths
No queue reassignment before stale packet-memory settlement
forbidden_claims: DMA receipt alone permits user-visible completion delivery
ring cleanup can submit old XSK completions normally after revoke
old packet memory can be returned to a new Domain without generation reset
